title: Token
description:
A token is an optional data, only needed when ODRP is used by the merchant.

A token represents a captured means of payment (card or any other means of payments). A token is used within the ODRP MiPS system (On Demand Recurring Payments).

A token is obtained by tokenizing a means of payment through a payment iFrame, a payment link or a QRCode payment.

The merchant can ask MiPS to take money on a token at any time.

A token can only be used by the merchant who created it.

A token is linked to the order id provided by the merchant on token creation.

A token is valid only for a lifetime determined by MiPS

The amount and frequencies are limited upfront.

id_token.description: A unique ID to be saved by the merchant. It represents the means of payment for this order.

token_for_id_order.description: The merchant initial id order used to create the token
